bird.name: Makira owl
bird.summary: The Makira owl (Athene roseoaxillaris), also known as the Makira boobook, is a small to medium-sized species of owl in the Family Strigidae…

relations.subject: Makira owl
relations.evidence: It lives in thick tropical rainforests, preferably in places where there is a lot of canopy cover
relations.object_summary: 结构复杂且冠层完整的高生物多样性森林。

relations.subject: Makira owl
relations.evidence: The international union for Conservation of Nature has classed the Makira owl as near threatened mostly because of habitat loss
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

relations.subject: Makira owl
relations.evidence: Species is seriously threatened by Makira Island deforestation for agricultural growth and timber extraction
relations.object_summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。
